headline: Estée Lauder Weighs Puig Merger As Financing And Valuation Questions Grow
summary: Estée Lauder Companies (NYSE:EL) is reported to be seeking a multibillion euro financing package to support a potential merger with Spanish beauty group Puig. The talks focus on arranging funding that could underpin one of the largest recent combinations in the global beauty sector. The financing effort signals a possible shift in how Estée Lauder positions its portfolio and brands within the competitive beauty market. For investors watching NYSE:EL, this financing move comes as the stock...

headline: Invesco Equity And Income Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: We purchased a new holding in the consumer discretionary sector. We also eliminated several holdings, using the proceeds to fund investments we believe have better risk/reward profiles.
